**TEMPO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: user-supplied `tempo.xyz`, not optimized. SCF converged in 12 cycles. HOMO = -6.3375439 eV, LUMO = -2.4651235 eV → **gap ≈ 3.8724203 eV**.

The calculation was performed using the following command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 2 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp5ec768l4/live.json`.
The live log is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260703-231611_tempo_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260703-231618.out`.
No warnings were reported.
